Red Dead Redemption 2 集中討論區(13)


遊戲介紹
時間是 1899 年的美國。執法人員開始追捕殘存的亡命之徒幫派，舊西部時代的終章也隨之展開。不願投降或屈服者紛紛喪命。

亞瑟．摩根和范特林幫派在西部城鎮黑水鎮的搶劫出了嚴重差錯後，一行人不得不開始逃亡。遭到聯邦探員和國內最出色賞金獵人追捕的他們為了生存，必需劫掠與戰鬥，跨越整個蠻荒的美國腹地。隨著幫派的內部分裂愈演愈烈，亞瑟必須做出抉擇：忠於自己的理想，還是一心忠於扶養他長大的幫派。

Red Dead Redemption 2 由 Grand Theft Auto V 及 Red Dead Redemption 創作團隊榮譽呈現，講述在邁向現代化之初的美國所綻放的生命詩篇。遊戲將於 2018 年 10 月 26 日在 PlayStation 4 與 Xbox One 平台推出。

Reddit見到, 未證實:

This really blew up, thank you for reading. All this information has been put here before I just piled it all together, take all with a grain of salt. I have reorganized the context so it's easier to read. All the info provided here come from achievements, Developer interviews, game files and reliable leakers. Hope this sheds a light on the direction Rockstar are going, in my opinion I'm pretty hyped.

Info dump:

You will create your character, much more depth than GTAV (Male/Female)

You break out of jail, not sure where from or how it unwinds

There is a storyline and side storylines

Multiplayer promotes roleplay and harmony, griefers are punished

If you are constantly killed by a player you can tell the law (See 1.)

You can interact with players and they can interact back

You will get a bounty if you kill another player and you're spotted

You can own property and horses, including wagons

Content and future content to come will remain relevant to the time period

This game is less grindy than GTAV but more grindy than Singleplayer

Events pay heavily and promote unique player encounters

Adversary mode will be fun over realism like GTAV (?)

You can set up and edit camps, the temporary little ones in single player

You can create posses and fight posse vs posse

There is at least 50 player levels
